title: Procbomber Bench Scene Extensions
description: Project-local component types for the procbomber bench. BenchAnimationState drives stub limb-free animations during S101 so the bench dropdown wires through the data path; the real S102 animation systems will replace it once limb anchors split into separate transforms.

limbPivotsComponent.description: S102 PROCBOMBER-LIMB-PIVOTS-COMPONENT. Carries entity ids of the nine actuated pivots created by the bomber-tree spawner. Animation systems look up pivots by name from here rather than walking the Transform tree every fixedUpdate. The spawner writes one LimbPivots on the bomber's root entity; the names are non-negotiable — future animation systems grep for these exact fields.

benchAnimationStateComponent.description: Drives the bench's stub animation. `kind` selects which animation runs; `elapsed` is the system-internal time accumulator (seconds since the last kind change).
